scripts.name: influencer-scanner
scripts.description: Fetch posts from tracked influencers across social platforms

scripts.name: market-researcher
scripts.description: Search market signals for trending topics across social platforms

scripts.name: content-scorer
scripts.description: Score and classify findings into HOT/WARM/SEED tiers for content generation

scripts.name: report-parser
scripts.description: Parse Miner markdown reports and insert findings, scores, and opportunities into the DB

scripts.name: action-generator
scripts.description: Generate daily/weekly action notes from pipeline outputs and inject into task board

scripts.name: db-manager
scripts.description: Shared SQLite DB CLI for market intelligence — schema init, data ingestion, queries

agents.name: miner
agents.description: Analyzes raw data (posts, market signals, transcripts), extracts findings, scores against target markets, and stores in the intelligence layer

agents.name: content-forge
agents.description: Reads today's intelligence, scores and ranks findings, writes bilingual content drafts (EN + AR) with anti-slop quality

agents.name: strategist
agents.description: Weekly agent that identifies monetizable business opportunities from accumulated market intelligence

mcpServers.name: filesystem
mcpServers.description: Read, write, and manage files with secure path controls

mcpServers.name: github
mcpServers.description: GitHub repos, issues, PRs, and code search via GitHub API

mcpServers.name: linear
mcpServers.description: Linear issues, projects, cycles, and team management

mcpServers.name: slack
mcpServers.description: Send messages, read channels, and manage Slack workspaces

mcpServers.name: playwright
mcpServers.description: Browser automation — navigate, click, fill forms, screenshot

mcpServers.name: context7
mcpServers.description: Up-to-date documentation context for any library or framework

mcpServers.name: sequential-thinking
mcpServers.description: Structured step-by-step reasoning for complex problems

mcpServers.name: stitch
mcpServers.description: Generate full UI screens and design variants with Gemini

env_vars.name: STITCH_API_KEY
env_vars.description: Stitch API key for screen generation
